headline: Jim Cramer on General Mills: “Management Doesn’t Seem to Recognize That the Stock’s Turned Into a Very Suboptimal Situation”
summary: General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer evaluated, along with the fragile food market. Cramer highlighted why the company had to cut its earnings forecast, as he commented: This is not the only example. When General Mills spoke at CAGNY, a key industry conference, they told a slightly better story. When […]
